fields.name: Team
fields.formula:
IF(FIND("Social Media Tasks", ARRAYJOIN({fldW9GSQY2qVqVG5l}, ",")), "Social Media",
IF(FIND("Films Tasks", ARRAYJOIN({fldW9GSQY2qVqVG5l}, ",")), "Films",
IF(FIND("Design Tasks", ARRAYJOIN({fldW9GSQY2qVqVG5l}, ",")), "Design",
IF(FIND("VSL Tasks", ARRAYJOIN({fldW9GSQY2qVqVG5l}, ",")), "VSL",
"—"))))

fields.name: 🔗 Asset Link
fields.formula:
IF(
    {fldFJgpi9mhLWhazV},
    IF(
        FIND("|", {fldFJgpi9mhLWhazV}),
        TRIM(SUBSTITUTE(
            LEFT({fldFJgpi9mhLWhazV}, FIND("|", {fldFJgpi9mhLWhazV}) - 1),
            "[", ""
        )),
        TRIM(SUBSTITUTE({fldFJgpi9mhLWhazV}, "[", ""))
    ),
    IF(
        {fld7IsdTVNmQsPHU7},
        IF(
            FIND("|", {fld7IsdTVNmQsPHU7}),
            TRIM(SUBSTITUTE(
                LEFT({fld7IsdTVNmQsPHU7}, FIND("|", {fld7IsdTVNmQsPHU7}) - 1),
                "[", ""
            )),
            TRIM(SUBSTITUTE({fld7IsdTVNmQsPHU7}, "[", ""))
        ),
        "N/A"
    )
)

fields.name: Jira Project Type
fields.formula:
SWITCH(
    LEFT({fldKFOh7zxWnaXTTQ}, 3),
    "CST", "Creative Services Team",
    "CSR", "Creative Services Requests", "ASD", "Acquire Service Desk"
)

fields.name: Event Date
fields.formula:
IF(
  AND({fldptDXKOuSH0AKZF}, {fld2GajjHZHHU4nEn}),
  DATETIME_FORMAT({fldptDXKOuSH0AKZF}, 'MMM D, YYYY') & " – " & DATETIME_FORMAT({fld2GajjHZHHU4nEn}, 'MMM D, YYYY'),
  IF(
    {fldptDXKOuSH0AKZF},
    DATETIME_FORMAT({fldptDXKOuSH0AKZF}, 'MMM D, YYYY'),
    "N/A"
  )
)

fields.name: 🛎️ Complexity_Asset Type [SCORE]
fields.formula:
IF({fldKras453YQbbZzO}=5,1,
IF({fldKras453YQbbZzO}=4,2,
IF({fldKras453YQbbZzO}=3,3,
IF({fldKras453YQbbZzO}=2,4,
IF({fldKras453YQbbZzO}=1,5,
BLANK())))))

fields.name: Content Producer
fields.formula:
IF(
    OR(
        {fldHqpB4sWrTdSbpb} = "Hassaan Islam",
        {fldHqpB4sWrTdSbpb} = "Anna Franchini",
        {fldHqpB4sWrTdSbpb} = "Muhammad Mbwana"
    ),
    {fldHqpB4sWrTdSbpb},
    IF(
        OR(
            {fldSyMvsihIniAu9W} = "Hassaan Islam",
            {fldSyMvsihIniAu9W} = "Anna Franchini",
            {fldSyMvsihIniAu9W} = "Muhammad Mbwana"
        ),
        {fldSyMvsihIniAu9W},
        BLANK()
    )
)
